rag_rules: Insert AGREE annex blocks into the target implementation scope only when bindings depend on subcomponent internals or implementation-specific state.
Preserve AADL component type structure by avoiding direct references to subcomponent ports in type-level annexes.
generic_rules: Scope annex content to the level of the model element being modified: type for visible interfaces, implementation for internal bindings.
Only reference AADL features (ports, parameters, properties) that are explicitly declared in the target scope.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Use 'annex agree {** ... **};' to enclose all AGREE content.
Declare helper equations with explicit types: int, real, or bool.
anti_patterns: Do not embed AADL property names (e.g., Period, Deadline) as AGREE variables unless explicitly exposed as ports or constants.
Avoid referencing subcomponent ports directly in component type annexes.
